title: Organisation
description: The customer entity under assessment. One Assessment Owner; one or more assessments over time.

industry.description: Free-text industry label; not part of classification logic.

assessment_owner.description: The accountable human; receives every approval-checkpoint prompt.

steer_instance_url.description: If non-null, runtime evidence pull via O_steer_runtime_pull is enabled (R014).

mandate_subscription_id.description: If non-null, Mandate change-feed (R015) flags affect this organisation's classifications.
